title: Indentation
intro: `>>` indents the current line, `<<` dedents it. In Visual mode, `>` and `<` shift the whole selection. Prefix with a count to affect several lines: `3>>`.

exercises.instruction: Indent this line one level with `>>` (adds two spaces).
hints: Press `>` twice to indent the current line.

exercises.instruction: This line is over-indented. Remove one level with `<<`.
hints: Press `<` twice to dedent the current line one level.

exercises.instruction: Indent both lines at once: select them with `V` then `j`, and press `>`.
hints: In Visual mode a single `>` indents the whole selection.

exercises.instruction: The function body is not indented. Fix it with `>>`.
hints: `>>` indents only the current line — the braces stay put.

exercises.instruction: All three lines are over-indented. Select them with `V` `j` `j` and dedent with `<`.
hints: One `<` in Visual mode shifts the whole selection left.
